data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario regarding graceful degradation when the agent is confused.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior when the agent is confused, but there is no evidence provided that confirms the expected outcome or behavior in this situation. The linked use cases and prior steps do not address this specific scenario, indicating a lack of necessary evidence to assert a definitive conclusion. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive.
gaps: No evidence of scenario behavior when the agent is confused.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the scenario behavior.
